channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KREX 5

item.title: Trump picks Jay Bhattacharya, who backed COVID herd immunity, to lead National Institutes of Health
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has chosen health economist Dr. Jay Bhattacharya, a critic of pandemic lockdowns and vaccine mandates, to lead the National Institutes of Health, the nation's leading medical research agency.
item.dc:creator: CARLA K. JOHNSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump names speechwriter Vince Haley as Domestic Policy Council chief
item.description: President-elect Trump announced on Tuesday night that Vince Haley, his campaign speechwriter, will be the next chief of the Domestic Policy Council (DPC). “As Director of the Domestic Policy Council, Vince will help make life better for ALL Americans, and unify our Country through SUCCESS.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: World's oldest man has died in England at 112
item.description: John Alfred Tinniswood was born a few months after the sinking of the Titanic and lived through two world wars.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Is your turkey dry? This might be why
item.description: Every year in the weeks leading up to Thanksgiving, the holiday conversation inevitably turns to one question regarding the annual feast: is turkey any good? While debates and discussions about which side dishes are the best, it seems like the star of the show often gets overlooked, or worse, malign
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Very cold air arrives after Thanksgiving
item.description: High temperatures today were much different than yesterday's highs around 60°. Highs reached only the low 40s, much closer to seasonal averages. For the evening, we're experiencing temperatures falling out of the 40s and into the 30s. By morning, we'll be as low as the low 30s.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Ferreri, NewsNation

item.title: Thanksgiving Day: Mostly cloudy and cool with a chance of snow late
item.description: One of the busiest travel times of the year is upon us and while there's going to be some mixed precipitation in the run up to Thanksgiving and lake effect snow chances following into next weekend, Thanksgiving Day itself looks to be fairly quiet.
item.dc:creator: Scott Larson, NewsNation

item.title: How Trump's bet on voters electing him managed to silence some of his legal woes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One year after the Jan. 6, 2021, U.S. Capitol attack, Attorney General Merrick Garland said the Justice Department was committed to holding accountable all perpetrators “at any level” for “the assault on our democracy.
item.dc:creator: ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Charlotte airport workers stop strike amid pay dispute
item.description: Employees went on strike Monday to protest their current wages, but have returned to work despite the situation remaining unsolved.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Biden officials, Republicans point fingers over exhausted disaster loans program
item.description: A blame game between the Biden administration and GOP lawmakers is underway after a key disaster loan program saw its funds run out in the middle of a destructive hurricane season.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Anti-police activist blew $75K in charity funds for luxury vacation rentals, other personal expenses: AG
item.description: The founder of a DC-based police reform nonprofit allegedly misused charitable donations "to fund lavish vacations and shopping sprees," prosecutors say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Walmart becomes largest company to roll back diversity, equity and inclusion policies
item.description: Walmart, the world’s largest retailer, is rolling back its diversity, equity and inclusion policies, joining a growing list of major corporations that have done the same after coming under attack by conservative activists.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Holiday travel 'presents opportunities' for sex traffickers to blend in. Here's what experts say to look for
item.description: Human trafficking experts explain what 'red flags' to look for during the busy holiday travel season, which may make it easier for criminals to blend in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What Black Friday's history tells us about holiday shopping in 2024
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The holiday shopping season is about to reach full speed with Black Friday, which kicks off the post-Thanksgiving retail rush later this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare, Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs like like Wegovy or Ozempic
item.description: A bipartisan coalition of congressional members have lobbied for the drugs to be covered by Medicare, saying it could save the government from spending billions of dollars on treating chronic ailments that stem from obesity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare and Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs for millions of obese Americans
item.description: Millions of Americans with obesity would be eligible to have popular weight-loss drugs like Wegovy or Ozempic covered by Medicare or Medicaid under a new rule the Biden administration proposed Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: AMANDA SEITZ Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Auto industry's shift toward EVs is expected to go on despite Trump threat to kill tax credits
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If President-elect Donald Trump makes good on his threat to kill federal tax credits for electric vehicle purchases, it’s likely that fewer buyers will choose EVs.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER AP Auto Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Police bust 3 thrill seekers in bathroom stall after trio spotted atop iconic Nashville building
item.description: Police released a 911 call describing an incident that happened on Sunday afternoon where three men were seen on top of Nashville's tallest building.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Onion's bid for Alex Jones' Infowars hangs in the balance as judge orders new hearing
item.description: A bankruptcy judge on Monday delayed a hearing in conspiracy theorist Alex Jones’ effort to stop the satirical news outlet The Onion from buying Infowars, keeping the auction sale up in the air for at least another few weeks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge in LA delays until January decision on resentencing Menendez brothers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A judge on Monday delayed until January his decision on whether to resentence Erik and Lyle Menendez for killing their parents in their Beverly Hills mansion 35 years ago, squashing their family’s hope the brothers would be released and home for the holidays.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: American, Frontier planes clip wings at Logan International Airport in Boston
item.description: Officials confirmed that two planes operated by American Airlines and Frontier Airlines clipped wings on the tarmac at Logan International Airport in Boston on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Special counsel moves to dismiss election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith asked a federal judge on Monday to dismiss the case accusing President-elect Donald Trump of plotting to overturn the 2020 election, citing longstanding Justice Department policy shielding presidents from prosecution while in office.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bird flu detected in raw milk from California, state officials warn
item.description: The avian influenza virus has been detected in a retail sample of raw milk from a California-based raw dairy farm, California health officials confirmed Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Isaiah Varela, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Father of Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles found dead near LAX
item.description: Ryan Kobayashi, father of a 31-year-old Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles nearly two weeks ago, was found dead near Los Angeles International Airport early Sunday morning, officials confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, WGN 9

item.title: Remains of Pennsylvania teen at center of 1973 cold case identified as investigation continues
item.description: Ruth Elizabeth Brenneman was last seen leaving for school more than 50 years ago. Now, her remains have been identified as the investigation into her disappearance continues.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, ABC 4

item.title: New details emerge on BioLab fire that forced thousands to shelter outside Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Federal authorities have released an update on the investigation into fires at the BioLab chemical plant near Atlanta that produced a toxic chemical cloud and forced nearby residents to shelter in place. The fires broke out Sept.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Walmart executive says some prices might rise if Trump's tariffs take effect
item.description: A Walmart executive warned that President-elect Trump’s plans to raise tariffs on imports could drive the retail giant to increase the price of store items.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina women stunned by fifth-ranked UCLA 77-62, ending Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Earth bids farewell to its temporary 'mini moon': What it was, and where it's going
item.description: Currently, more than 2 million miles away, the object is too small and faint to see without a powerful telescope.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hezbollah fires about 250 rockets and other projectiles into Israel in heaviest barrage in weeks
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Hezbollah fired about 250 rockets and other projectiles into Israel on Sunday, wounding seven people in one of the militant group's heaviest barrages in months, in response to deadly Israeli strikes in Beirut while negotiators pressed on with cease-fire efforts to halt the all-out war.
item.dc:creator: KAREEM CHEHAYEB and TIA GOLDENBERG, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: After Trump's win, Black women are rethinking their role as America's reliable political organizers
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — As she checked into a recent flight to Mexico for vacation, Teja Smith chuckled at the idea of joining another Women’s March on Washington.
item.dc:creator: KENYA HUNTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Salad topping sold in Florida, 21 other states recalled over wrong ingredient
item.description: The packagers should contain tortilla strips but instead, consumers have found crispy onion strips inside.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Winter storms possible across US during Thanksgiving week, forecasts warn
item.description: Forecasters throughout the U.S. issued warnings that another round of winter weather could complicate travel leading up to the Thanksgiving holiday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Earth bids farewell to its temporary 'mini moon' that is possibly a chunk of our actual moon
item.description: The harmless space rock will peel away on Monday, overcome by the stronger tug of the sun’s gravity. But it will zip closer for a quick visit in January.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Storm inundates Northern California with rain, heavy snow. Thousands remain in the dark in Seattle
item.description: HEALDSBURG, Calif. (AP) — Heavy downpours fell over much of Northern California on Friday, causing small landslides, overflowing a river and flooding some streets, including in parts of San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: NOAH BERGER and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, ABC 4
